relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Sardis has a name of life but must awaken.
Strengthen what remains before it dies.
Remember, keep, and turn.
A few walk in white.
The conqueror is clothed and named before the Father.
Hear what Spirit says.
Philadelphia hears from the Holy and True One with David’s key.
A door is opened for little-power faithfulness.
Hostile claims are exposed before beloved ones.
Endurance is kept in testing.
Hold what you have.
The conqueror becomes a pillar named with Divine city and new name.
Hear what Spirit says.
Laodicea hears from the Amen, faithful witness, source of creation.
Lukewarm works are named.
Self-satisfied tepidity is rejected.
Wealth says 'I need nothing' while blindness and nakedness remain.
Refined gold, white garments, and eye-salve are offered.
Love exposes and trains toward turning.
The door-knocking one comes to share table fellowship.
The conqueror shares the throne.
Hear what Spirit says.

contemplative_note: Revelation 3 completes the lampstand diagnosis: wake up, hold fast, open the door, and receive the table of the faithful witness.
